evidence.decolonization: Borscht framed as Ukrainian UNESCO urgent-safeguarding heritage without exclusive ownership claims; Soviet/common-kitchen erasure and tourist reduction explicitly corrected.
evidence.pedagogy: Reading sequence now asks learners to compare social contract, ritual address, and calendar-meal ordering through source excerpts rather than isolated sayings.
evidence.reading: Four on-site structured readings in generated MDX: substantial public-domain Hrushevsky excerpts for bread as marriage foundation, bread exchange, korovai as sacred ritual object, and Sviatvechir food order; one-line Zynoviyiv sayings were removed from structured PrimaryReading blocks.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 bridge review task review-folk-m38-reading-fix returned PASS with no blockers and independently verified all four Hrushevsky excerpts through sources.verify_quote.
